common.internetRetry: Check your internet connection and refresh the page.

footer.desc: A catalog of memorial places with a map, route planner, and guide chat — for meaningful city walks.

staticPage.notFoundText: Check the URL or open a link from the site footer.
staticPage.noSlugText: Add a slug query param, e.g. page.html?slug=about
staticPage.loadError: Could not load content. Try refreshing.

home.heroSubtitle: History captured in places. Explore monuments, memorials, and locations of events that changed the world.
home.aboutText: Monuments, memorials, sculptures, and places of major events. Each card tells a story: author, era, photos, and sometimes a 3D model. Build your route by city or explore by eras.
home.aboutTextExtra: In the catalog, you can filter by era, tags, photos, and 3D. On the map, you can quickly inspect location clusters, while the guide chat helps assemble an itinerary based on your interests and available time.
home.introPoint1Text: Short historical notes, dates, authors, and links to wider eras.
home.introPoint2Text: Fast flow from catalog to map and into your personal route without extra clicks.
home.introPoint3Text: Build routes, split them by days, and check nearby infrastructure on demand.
home.collectionsHint: Open the catalog with ready-made filters
home.mapTeaserText: Open the map to quickly orient yourself and build a route.
home.guideTeaserText: Not sure where to start? Describe your interest and get a curated selection.
home.step1Text: Catalog with filters for tags, 3D, photos, and years. Collections open themed lists in one click.
home.step2Text: Points on an interactive map, address search, and quick jump to each place page.
home.step3Text: Need walk ideas? Describe your interest in chat — get a curated list with links.

catalog.title: All memorial places
catalog.subtitle: Search by title, address, and tags. Filters and sorting sync with URL, so links can be shared.
catalog.emptyDbText: The catalog is empty for now. You can leave a suggestion via the feedback form.

place.author: Author / sculptor
place.reviewsNone: No reviews yet. Be the first!
place.reviewEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
place.reviewLoginRequired: Sign in to leave a review.
place.reviewAuthOk: Signed in. The review will be posted from your account.
place.reviewSendError: Failed to submit. Please try again.
place.reviewCommentPlaceholder: Share your impressions about this place…
place.notFoundText: It may have been removed or the link is outdated.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Contact us if you found an issue, want to suggest an idea, or share service-related feedback.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe your question, issue, or suggestion…
feedback.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
feedback.sendError: Failed to submit. Please try again.
feedback.successText: We received your feedback and will review it shortly.

auth.pageTitle: Sign in and registration — Traces of the Past
auth.pageDescription: Sign in or create an account to leave feedback, save favorites, and keep your view history.
auth.title: Sign in and registration
auth.subtitle: One account for feedback, favorites, and history. Passwords are handled by Firebase Authentication — we never see them in plain text.
auth.cardSub: Your account helps you keep favorites and history synced. Authentication data is handled by Firebase.
auth.helpText: By continuing, you agree to the service rules.
auth.note: If you are on a shared computer, avoid saving your password in the browser. After sign in, you can return to the catalog and build a route.
auth.errorFillEmailPassword: Please fill in email and password.
auth.errorEmailInUse: This email is already in use.
auth.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Moderation statuses for your reviews. Latest changes are shown first.
notifications.hint: By default, 5 latest notifications are shown.
notifications.empty: No new notifications — all reviews are processed or none were submitted yet.
notifications.textRejected: Your review was rejected by moderator.

map.siteNoMatches: No matches found among site places.
map.siteSuggestionsHint: Start typing — site places will appear first.
map.globalTypeMore: Type at least 3 characters to search cities and addresses worldwide.

chat.headerSub: Ask a question about history, monuments, or cultural heritage
chat.welcomeSub: I can help with historical places, events, architecture, and cultural heritage. Ask me anything from these topics.
chat.hint1: Tell me about the Colosseum in Rome
chat.hint2: What happened in the Battle of Stalingrad?
chat.hint3: What monuments are there in Saint Petersburg?
chat.errServiceUnavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
chat.errTooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
chat.errServer: Server error. Please try again later.
chat.errNetwork: Network error. Check your internet connection.
chat.errEmpty: Could not get a response. Try rephrasing your question.
chat.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

route.title: My route
route.subtitle: Add places from the catalog and place pages. Here you can reorder, share, and keep planning.
route.emptyText: Open the catalog and add a few places — they will appear here.
route.shareEmpty: Your route is empty — add places from the catalog, then share the link.
route.saveModalHint: The route appears in your account. «Open route» restores the same stop order.
route.loginToSave: Sign in to save this route
route.savedError: Could not save. Check that you’re signed in and Firestore rules allow writes.
route.savedDuplicate: This route is already saved — open your profile list or change the stops.
route.geocodeError: Address not found — try a clearer query
route.findingEndHotelsList: Loading hotels near the last stop…
route.endHotelListLoaded: Pick a hotel from the list, then tap «Use this hotel»
route.endHotelPickHint: Tap «Find hotels for destination» in the button row below, then choose a hotel from the list.
route.endHotelNotFound: Could not find a hotel near the route
route.endHotelDetectError: Could not load hotels for destination
route.optimizeNeedCoords: Need coordinates for at least two places
route.optimizeApiError: API optimization failed, try Fast mode
route.oneDayHint: 1 day is selected now. Choose 2+ days to plan overnights.
route.overnightHint: Overnight after the last stop of the day — pick a hotel between days.
route.pickOvernightHotel: Find a hotel for the night
route.nightHotelApplied: Overnight stop added to the route
route.nightHotelNeedCoords: Need coordinates at the day boundary to search for hotels.
route.poiNeedRoute: Add route points with coordinates to search nearby infrastructure.
route.altAriaGroup: Choose route option shown on the map
route.altVariantsHint: Different paths along blocks and side streets — pick the route you prefer.

profileDashboard.homeSub: Manage your profile, reviews, saved places and routes — everything about working with the catalogue in one place.
profileDashboard.accountHint: Your name and email appear on reviews. Changing email requires confirmation with your password under Security.
profileDashboard.securityHint: To change password or email, enter your current password first — so we know it’s really you.
profileDashboard.reviewsCardHint: Reviews about places are moderated before publication.
profileDashboard.routesCardHint: Save itineraries on the Route page and open them here — stops stay in the same order.
profileDashboard.emailChangeHint: To change email, enter your current password below and submit again.
profileDashboard.statusPasswordShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
profileDashboard.statusSecurityErr: Could not update email/password. Check your current password.
profileDashboard.reviewsEmptyPreview: No reviews yet. Open a place page and share your impressions.
profileDashboard.reviewsLoadError: Could not load reviews. Check your connection and refresh.
profileDashboard.favoritesEmptyPreview: Save places from place pages — they’ll appear here.
profileDashboard.historyEmptyPreview: Recently opened place pages will appear here.
profileDashboard.favoritesPageSub: Places you saved to revisit later.
profileDashboard.historyPageSub: Recently opened place pages — quick access to continue browsing.
profileDashboard.reviewsPageSub: All reviews you submitted, with ratings and moderation status.
profileDashboard.reviewsEmptyFull: No reviews yet. Open a place page and share your impressions.
profileDashboard.favoritesEmptyFull: Save places from place pages — they’ll appear here.
profileDashboard.historyEmptyFull: Recently opened place pages will appear here.

profileRoutes.heroSub: Open a saved itinerary — stops appear in the same order as when you saved it.
profileRoutes.empty: No saved routes yet. On the Route page, add places and tap «Save to profile».

reviews.title: Place Reviews
reviews.emptyText: They will appear here when users start leaving reviews.

media.title: Media Library
media.uploadHint: Drag images here or click to select

places.title: Places
places.emptyText: Click Add to create the first place.
places.photosDrag: Drag photos or click to select
places.photosFormat: JPEG, PNG, WEBP · up to 10 MB each

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.emptyText: It will appear here when users start leaving feedback.
